goal: Yrkesroll: spray painter (ONET SOC 51-9123 — Painting, Coating, and Decorating Workers; backlog also cites adjacent 51-4193 plating-machine code). A UR10 picks a rigid spray-gun proxy (vertical Cylinder body + Cone nozzle joined by a FixedJoint) from a wall mount, then traces a boustrophedon raster across a target Cube panel (0.50 x 0.30 x 0.02 m) while maintaining a ~0.10 m standoff between nozzle tip and panel surface. Linear speed ~0.20 m/s along each raster line. No paint particles are simulated — coverage is verified by recording the TCP trajectory (record_trajectory) and checking that the planar projection of TCP positions visits ≥80% of a discretized panel grid within the allotted simulation window. Distinguishes from CP-NEW-welder-seam-track (single 1-D seam follow, compliance-driven contact) and CP-NEW-oxe-sweep-into-dustpan (debris-push gesture, no parametric coverage). Realizes yrkesroll-paint-sprayer-trajectory-001.
thoughts: Pattern: coverage trajectory (boustrophedon raster) over a planar workpiece. NOT pick_place (the panel never moves), NOT sort (no class routing), NOT insert (no compliance contact), NOT navigate (fixed-base arm). pattern_hint='other'. Discriminating structural_tags: isaac:gesture.coverage_raster + isaac:trajectory.boustrophedon + isaac:yrkesroll.painter + isaac:industry.paint_spray.

Robot: UR10 chosen for reach (~1.3 m) — a 0.50 x 0.30 m panel + 0.10 m standoff + raster envelope requires Cartesian span ~0.60 m at near-constant Z, which is comfortable in the UR10 upper-arm regime but marginal for Franka (0.855 m reach). UR10 base on the ground at [0, 0, 0] keeps the panel within shoulder height.

Panel orientation: HORIZONTAL (panel top face at z=0.85, top-down spray). This is the simplest geometry for a constant-standoff raster — TCP just sweeps in the panel-XY plane at z=panel_top+standoff. failure_modes note that a tilted panel (e.g. car door at 30°) would require per-waypoint Z-adjustment from a panel-surface normal lookup, not a constant Z.

Spray-gun proxy: composite under /World/SprayGun with two rigid children — Body_ (Cylinder, 0.04 m radius, 0.18 m length, vertical) at [0.50, 0.50, 1.20] and Nozzle_ (Cone, 0.025 m radius, 0.06 m length, pointing -Z) at [0.50, 0.50, 1.08]. Joined by PhysicsFixedJointAPI on the Body so the gripper drags both as one rigid composite. Nozzle tip is at z=1.05 — when held by EE at z≈1.20, the tip stands off ~0.10 m above the panel top (z=0.85+0.10=0.95). End-effector_offset in setup_pick_place_controller compensates for the 0.15 m TCP-to-nozzle-tip offset along the gripper Z axis.

Boustrophedon raster: panel covers x ∈ [0.45, 0.95], y ∈ [-0.15, 0.15]. Line spacing 0.05 m → 7 raster lines along x (y = -0.15, -0.10, -0.05, 0.00, 0.05, 0.10, 0.15) connected by U-turns at alternating ends. Code emits 14 move_to_pose calls (one per raster endpoint) + 2 entry/exit waypoints = 16 waypoints total. Each waypoint at z=panel_top+standoff=0.95, gripper orientation [1,0,0,0] (gun pointing down).

Initial spray-gun pickup: setup_pick_place_controller with target_source='native' performs the pick phase on /World/SprayGun/Body. drop_targets points to the raster start pose so the controller's release height stays well above the panel — but, like in CP-NEW-oxe-sweep-into-dustpan, the canonical relies on the controller's pick phase completing before the move_to_pose raster chain executes (failure_modes #3 documents the gripper-release-mid-raster risk).

Speed control: move_to_pose has no native velocity field; speed is approximated by waypoint spacing — adjacent raster endpoints 0.50 m apart at 0.20 m/s = 2.5 s per line. Total raster duration ~7 lines × 2.5 s + 6 U-turns × 1.0 s = ~24 s. The Kit RPC executor scales waypoint dwell internally; explicit velocity scaling is left to a future scenario-profile override (see motion_controllers honesty note).

Coverage verification: record_trajectory captures UR10 joint trajectory for the full raster duration (30 s). Offline post-processing applies forward kinematics to recover TCP (x,y,z) per frame, projects onto the panel plane (x ∈ [0.45, 0.95], y ∈ [-0.15, 0.15]), discretizes into a 10 x 6 cell grid (5 cm cells), and counts cells whose centre is within ≤0.025 m of any TCP sample. Pass = ≥48/60 cells visited (=80%). get_world_transform on a probe link (/World/UR10/tool0) at raster start and end records the bounding TCP envelope as a smoke check.

motion_controllers: rmpflow is the preferred planner for raster waypoints — reactive jacobian-based control handles the constant-Z Cartesian sweep cleanly without global re-plans at each U-turn. curobo is untested for this canonical because the planar coverage geometry doesn't exercise its scene-collision strengths. direct_joint is untested. impedance is NOT used (no contact force regulation — the spray gun is stand-off from the panel).
code:
# ── Scene skeleton ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1200.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# ── Paint booth fixture (panel sits on this) ─────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/PaintTable", prim_type="Cube",
            position=[0.70, 0.0, 0.40], scale=[0.80, 0.50, 0.40])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/PaintTable", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Target panel (horizontal, top face at z=0.85) ────────────────────────────
# Panel footprint x ∈ [0.45, 0.95], y ∈ [-0.15, 0.15], top z = 0.85.
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Panel", prim_type="Cube",
            position=[0.70, 0.0, 0.84], scale=[0.50, 0.30, 0.02])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Panel", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/Panel", attr_name="primvars:semanticLabel", value="paint_target")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/Panel", attr_name="primvars:displayColor", value=[[0.85, 0.85, 0.85]])

# ── UR10 robot on the ground at origin ───────────────────────────────────────
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="ur10",
    dest_path="/World/UR10",
    position=[0, 0, 0],
    orientation=[1, 0, 0, 0],
)
bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=["/World/UR10"],
    attr="physxArticulation:solverPositionIterationCount",
    value=16,
)

# ── Spray-gun composite (Body cylinder + Nozzle cone, FixedJoint-unified) ────
# Mounted in the gun rack at [0.50, 0.50, 1.20]. Nozzle tip points -Z to z=1.05.
create_prim(prim_path="/World/SprayGun", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/SprayGun/Body",
    prim_type="Cylinder",
    position=[0.50, 0.50, 1.20],
    scale=[0.04, 0.04, 0.18],
)
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/SprayGun/Nozzle",
    prim_type="Cone",
    position=[0.50, 0.50, 1.08],
    scale=[0.025, 0.025, 0.06],
)
for _part in ("/World/SprayGun/Body", "/World/SprayGun/Nozzle"):
    for _api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=_part, schema_name=_api)
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=["/World/SprayGun/Body", "/World/SprayGun/Nozzle"], attr="physics:mass", value=0.30)
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=["/World/SprayGun/Body", "/World/SprayGun/Nozzle"], attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=["/World/SprayGun/Body", "/World/SprayGun/Nozzle"], attr="physxRigidBody:enableCCD", value=True)
apply_physics_material(prim_path="/World/SprayGun/Body", material_name="rubber")
# Unify the spray-gun parts into a rigid composite via FixedJoint on the Body.
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/SprayGun/Body", schema_name="PhysicsFixedJointAPI")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/SprayGun/Body", attr_name="primvars:displayColor", value=[[0.2, 0.2, 0.25]])
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/SprayGun/Nozzle", attr_name="primvars:displayColor", value=[[0.85, 0.7, 0.1]])

# ── Grasp pose on the spray-gun body (top-down) ──────────────────────────────
define_grasp_pose(
    robot_path="/World/UR10",
    object_path="/World/SprayGun/Body",
    gripper_offset=[0.0, 0.0, 0.0],
    approach_direction=[0.0, 0.0, -1.0],
)

# ── Pick-place controller — grasp the spray gun from the rack ────────────────
# Pick phase grabs the spray gun; drop_targets steers the release point far above
# the panel so the controller does not fire its release sequence mid-raster.
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/UR10",
    target_source="native",
    robot_family="ur10",
    source_paths=["/World/SprayGun/Body"],
    destination_path="/World/Panel",
    drop_targets={"/World/SprayGun/Body": [0.70, 0.0, 1.50]},
    end_effector_offset=[0.0, 0.0, 0.15],
)

# ── Raster trajectory: boustrophedon over the panel ──────────────────────────
# Panel x ∈ [0.45, 0.95], y ∈ [-0.15, 0.15]. Line spacing 0.05 m → 7 raster lines.
# Standoff 0.10 m: panel top z=0.85 → TCP z=0.95.
# Entry waypoint above raster start
move_to_pose(
    articulation_path="/World/UR10",
    target_position=[0.45, -0.15, 1.10],
    target_orientation=[1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0],
    planner="rmpflow",
    robot_type="ur10",
)
# Raster line 1 (y=-0.15)
move_to_pose(articulation_path="/World/UR10", target_position=[0.45, -0.15, 0.95], target_orientation=[1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0], planner="rmpflow", robot_type="ur10")
move_to_pose(articulation_path="/World/UR10", target_position=[0.95, -0.15, 0.95], target_orientation=[1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0], planner="rmpflow", robot_type="ur10")
# Raster line 2 (y=-0.10, return)
move_to_pose(articulation_path="/World/UR10", target_position=[0.95, -0.10, 0.95], target_orientation=[1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0], planner="rmpflow", robot_type="ur10")
move_to_pose(articulation_path="/World/UR10", target_position=[0.45, -0.10, 0.95], target_orientation=[1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0], planner="rmpflow", robot_type="ur10")
# Raster line 3 (y=-0.05, forward)
move_to_pose(articulation_path="/World/UR10", target_position=[0.45, -0.05, 0.95], target_orientation=[1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0], planner="rmpflow", robot_type="ur10")
move_to_pose(articulation_path="/World/UR10", target_position=[0.95, -0.05, 0.95], target_orientation=[1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0], planner="rmpflow", robot_type="ur10")
# Raster line 4 (y=0.00, return)
move_to_pose(articulation_path="/World/UR10", target_position=[0.95, 0.00, 0.95], target_orientation=[1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0], planner="rmpflow", robot_type="ur10")
move_to_pose(articulation_path="/World/UR10", target_position=[0.45, 0.00, 0.95], target_orientation=[1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0], planner="rmpflow", robot_type="ur10")
# Raster line 5 (y=0.05, forward)
move_to_pose(articulation_path="/World/UR10", target_position=[0.45, 0.05, 0.95], target_orientation=[1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0], planner="rmpflow", robot_type="ur10")
move_to_pose(articulation_path="/World/UR10", target_position=[0.95, 0.05, 0.95], target_orientation=[1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0], planner="rmpflow", robot_type="ur10")
# Raster line 6 (y=0.10, return)
move_to_pose(articulation_path="/World/UR10", target_position=[0.95, 0.10, 0.95], target_orientation=[1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0], planner="rmpflow", robot_type="ur10")
move_to_pose(articulation_path="/World/UR10", target_position=[0.45, 0.10, 0.95], target_orientation=[1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0], planner="rmpflow", robot_type="ur10")
# Raster line 7 (y=0.15, forward)
move_to_pose(articulation_path="/World/UR10", target_position=[0.45, 0.15, 0.95], target_orientation=[1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0], planner="rmpflow", robot_type="ur10")
move_to_pose(articulation_path="/World/UR10", target_position=[0.95, 0.15, 0.95], target_orientation=[1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0], planner="rmpflow", robot_type="ur10")
# Exit waypoint above raster end
move_to_pose(
    articulation_path="/World/UR10",
    target_position=[0.95, 0.15, 1.10],
    target_orientation=[1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0],
    planner="rmpflow",
    robot_type="ur10",
)

# ── Record TCP trajectory for offline coverage analysis ──────────────────────
record_trajectory(
    articulation="/World/UR10",
    duration=30.0,
    output_path="workspace/trajectories/paint_sprayer_raster.npz",
    rate_hz=60.0,
)

# ── Smoke check: TCP world transform at raster start/end ────────────────────
get_world_transform(prim_path="/World/UR10/tool0")
get_world_transform(prim_path="/World/SprayGun/Nozzle")
extension_notes: Implements yrkesroll-paint-sprayer-trajectory-001 with rigid-spray-gun + horizontal-panel simplifications. Backlog cites ONET 51-4193 (Plating Machine Setters/Operators); the realised yrkesroll uses 51-9123 (Painting, Coating, and Decorating Workers) which is the cleaner ONET match for hand-spray + raster-coverage work. The backlog asset_dependency 'FANUC_M710_USD' is replaced by a generic UR10 (kept in-tree; FANUC asset blocked on Nucleus). 'nucleus_only_asset' blocker is downgraded by the substitution — note the structural difference (UR10 has 0.855 m elbow-up reach vs FANUC M710 1.45 m) and re-tune raster bounds if FANUC is ever wired in. Backlog 'motion_controller_preference: rmpflow' is honored.
failure_modes: STRUCTURAL SIMPLIFICATION: real spray painting models the spray cone, paint particle dynamics, and surface accumulation. This canonical models the spray gun as a rigid composite (Cylinder Body + Cone Nozzle joined by PhysicsFixedJointAPI) and verifies coverage via TCP trajectory ONLY — no particle simulation, no paint texture accumulation, no overspray. Consumers requiring true spray-physics should NOT retrieve this canonical.

STRUCTURAL SIMPLIFICATION 2: real automotive paint panels are curved (car door, hood, fender). This canonical uses a flat horizontal panel with constant-Z raster. A tilted or curved panel would require per-waypoint Z-adjustment from a surface-normal lookup (e.g. raycast against the panel mesh, project standoff along the normal). Mitigation: add a vision_plan_trajectory or pixel_to_world pass to extract panel-frame waypoints before constructing the raster.

Gripper releases mid-raster — setup_pick_place_controller may fire its release phase after reaching drop_targets, dropping the spray gun on the panel. Mitigation #1: set drop_targets to a Z far above panel (here z=1.50, panel_top=0.85). Mitigation #2: explicitly hold gripper closed via set_joint_targets on the UR10 gripper joints (if a gripper is mounted) before the raster move_to_pose chain begins. Mitigation #3: switch to a custom Cortex behavior that owns the gripper state across the full raster.

FixedJoint between Body and Nozzle via PhysicsFixedJointAPI — if the schema is not honored, the nozzle separates from the body during gripper drag and the standoff geometry breaks. Mitigation: switch to a single Xform with PhysicsRigidBodyAPI on the parent and shape children as a composite rigid body; loses the explicit FixedJoint metadata but keeps the parts together for the controller.

Standoff not maintained — if the raster Z (0.95) is too low, the nozzle drags on the panel; if too high, real-world spray pattern would be too diffuse (here only coverage geometry matters). Default standoff 0.10 m matches typical industrial HVLP gun spec. Tune via raster_params.standoff_m in settle_state.

Line spacing too wide — at line_spacing=0.05 m on a 0.30 m panel width, we get 7 lines × 0.05 m = 0.30 m exactly; coverage is dense. If spacing is widened to 0.08 m or more, gaps appear in the discretized coverage grid and the 80% threshold fails. Tune via raster_params.line_spacing_m.

U-turn overshoot — at sharp end-of-line turns, rmpflow's reactive jacobian control may overshoot the panel edge before doubling back. Mitigation: add intermediate sub-waypoints 0.02 m beyond the panel edge so the reversal happens off-panel; or reduce velocity_scaling at U-turn waypoints (not directly supported in current move_to_pose schema — would need a future per-waypoint speed override).

Panel orientation: code assumes horizontal panel (Z-normal). A vertical or 30°-tilted panel changes the raster geometry: the constant-Z plane misses the surface. failure_modes #2 covers the curved-panel case; for tilted-flat panels, swap target_position[2] for a panel-frame-projected coordinate computed offline.

move_to_pose has no native velocity parameter — 'linear speed ~0.20 m/s' is approximate, determined by Kit RPC executor's internal dwell scaling between waypoints. Real industrial paint robots use ros2_control trajectory streams with explicit per-segment velocities. Future work: implement velocity_scaling on a per-waypoint basis or stream the raster as a follow_trajectory_with_compliance trajectory with explicit pose timings.

record_trajectory captures joint trajectory, not TCP — coverage verification requires forward kinematics offline to recover (x,y,z)_TCP per frame. Output .npz contains joint positions/velocities/efforts; the consumer (verify pass) must run UR10 FK against the recorded joints. If the consumer skips FK and uses joint values directly, the coverage check is meaningless.

Spray-gun pickup race — if the pick_place_controller's pick phase has not completed (gripper not closed on Body) before the first move_to_pose fires, the gun is left in the rack and the raster sweeps an empty TCP through air. Mitigation: insert sim_control(action='step', step_count=60) (1 s) between setup_pick_place_controller and the first raster waypoint to allow the pick phase to settle.
verified_status: drafted-2026-05-16; form-gate-schema ⏳ pending-lint; function-gate ⏳ Kit RPC; structural-simplifications-noted (rigid spray-gun, flat horizontal panel, no particle physics)

spray_gun.note: Composite Xform: Body (Cylinder) + Nozzle (Cone) unified by FixedJoint

panel.note: Horizontal target panel; top face is the coverage surface

operator_role.title: Spray Painter / Coating Operator
operator_role.onet_soc_note: 51-9123 is the direct ONET match for hand-spray + raster-coverage work. Backlog yrkesroll-paint-sprayer-trajectory-001 cites 51-4193 (Plating Machine Setters/Operators), which is a less precise sibling code; 51-9123 covers manual-spray with operator-controlled gun trajectory and is preferred here. Adjacent 51-9121 (Coating, Painting, and Spraying Machine Setters, Operators, and Tenders) is also acceptable when the workflow emphasises automated tending of a machine-controlled spray cycle.

code_template:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1200.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})
create_prim(prim_path={{paint_table.path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{paint_table.position}}, scale={{paint_table.scale}})
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{paint_table.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path={{panel.path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{panel.position}}, scale={{panel.scale}})
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{panel.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_attribute(prim_path={{panel.path}}, attr_name="primvars:semanticLabel", value="paint_target")
robot_wizard(robot_name={{primary_robot.class}}, dest_path={{primary_robot.path}}, position={{primary_robot.position}}, orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}})
create_prim(prim_path={{spray_gun.path}}, prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path={{spray_gun.body_path}}, prim_type="Cylinder", position={{spray_gun.body_position}}, scale=[0.04, 0.04, 0.18])
create_prim(prim_path={{spray_gun.nozzle_path}}, prim_type="Cone", position={{spray_gun.nozzle_position}}, scale=[0.025, 0.025, 0.06])
for _part in ({{spray_gun.body_path}}, {{spray_gun.nozzle_path}}):
    for _api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=_part, schema_name=_api)
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=[{{spray_gun.body_path}}, {{spray_gun.nozzle_path}}], attr="physics:mass", value=0.30)
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=[{{spray_gun.body_path}}, {{spray_gun.nozzle_path}}], attr="physxRigidBody:enableCCD", value=True)
apply_physics_material(prim_path={{spray_gun.body_path}}, material_name="rubber")
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{spray_gun.body_path}}, schema_name="PhysicsFixedJointAPI")
define_grasp_pose(robot_path={{primary_robot.path}}, object_path={{spray_gun.body_path}}, gripper_offset=[0.0, 0.0, 0.0], approach_direction=[0.0, 0.0, -1.0])
setup_pick_place_controller(robot_path={{primary_robot.path}}, target_source="native", robot_family={{primary_robot.class}}, source_paths=[{{spray_gun.body_path}}], destination_path={{panel.path}}, drop_targets={{{spray_gun.body_path}}: [0.70, 0.0, 1.50]}, end_effector_offset=[0.0, 0.0, 0.15])
move_to_pose(articulation_path={{primary_robot.path}}, target_position=[0.45, -0.15, 1.10], target_orientation=[1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0], planner="rmpflow", robot_type={{primary_robot.class}})
move_to_pose(articulation_path={{primary_robot.path}}, target_position=[0.45, -0.15, 0.95], target_orientation=[1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0], planner="rmpflow", robot_type={{primary_robot.class}})
move_to_pose(articulation_path={{primary_robot.path}}, target_position=[0.95, -0.15, 0.95], target_orientation=[1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0], planner="rmpflow", robot_type={{primary_robot.class}})
move_to_pose(articulation_path={{primary_robot.path}}, target_position=[0.95, 0.15, 0.95], target_orientation=[1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0], planner="rmpflow", robot_type={{primary_robot.class}})
move_to_pose(articulation_path={{primary_robot.path}}, target_position=[0.95, 0.15, 1.10], target_orientation=[1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0], planner="rmpflow", robot_type={{primary_robot.class}})
record_trajectory(articulation={{primary_robot.path}}, duration=30.0, output_path="workspace/trajectories/paint_sprayer_raster.npz", rate_hz=60.0)
get_world_transform(prim_path={{spray_gun.nozzle_path}})
